assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'PodDisruptionBudgets (PDBs) - Most Common' as the first cause and mentions it's the most likely blocker at the end

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Includes 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' and 'kubectl describe pdb --all-namespaces' commands

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes multiple commands like 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase!=Running' and commands to find pending/terminating pods

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Provides commands to check for pending pods and includes checks for pods with specific status phases that indicate resource constraints

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Shows kubectl patch commands to adjust PDBs: 'kubectl patch pdb <pdb-name> -n <namespace> -p '{"spec":{"minAvailable":0}}'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout behavior or automatic force-drain after 1 hour

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Does not mention surge upgrade settings or surge capacity configuration as a solution

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Does not identify admission webhooks or mutating/validating webhooks as a potential cause of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Does not provide specific validation steps to confirm that the fixes have resolved the upgrade issue

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Does not mention POD_PDB_VIOLATION notifications, Cloud Logging, or Pub/Sub integration for disruption events
